steps.title: Match the blending examples
steps.content: The examples describe artists combining Indigenous musical elements with electronic music. That blending shows that the artists do not maintain a firm boundary between Indigenous music and other styles. The blank needs a verb meaning refuse to accept that distinction.

steps.title: Eliminate weak verbs
steps.content:
• Choice B: "Observe" means notice or follow a distinction, which conflicts with the blending examples.
  • Choice C: "Replace" would mean one style takes the place of another, not that the styles are combined.
  • Choice D: "Disguise" suggests hiding a distinction, not refusing to keep it in place.
The answer is A.
